name: defold-codex-toolkit
description: Defold-specific Codex workflow toolkit and reusable runtime library for build, UI/input, UI text/fonts, debugging, project conventions, and portable Lua score/session helpers.

interface.longDescription: Provides narrowly scoped Defold workflow skills for builds, GUI and input work, UI text/font coverage, debugging, and project convention checks, plus a Defold library namespace with portable Lua score, result UI, and session helpers.
defaultPrompt: Audit this Defold input flow for focus and modal routing bugs
Check this Defold HUD text for missing glyph or font coverage risks
Check whether this Defold build or bundle setup matches the local project
Review this Defold project structure before editing gameplay or GUI code
